_meta.source: Empirical testing via vamos against instruction variants

cli.usage: GenAm FROM/A TO/K WITH/K INCDIR/K/M HEADER/K/M QUIET/S
cli.notes: GenAm always wraps output in Amiga hunk format; no raw binary equivalent

auto_config.behavior: Auto-loaded from GenAm's directory if present
auto_config.vamos_issue: incdir paths in shipped opts file don't exist under vamos, causing errors

org.restriction: Not allowed for linkable code (default Amiga executable mode)

pc_relative_star.notes: Used for branch targets in testing since ORG is forbidden in default executable mode

platform_notes.option_notes: Each OPT must be on its own line; comma-separated OPTs on one line cause errors

encoding_behaviors.description: Routes ADD/AND/OR/SUB/EOR #imm,Dn to dedicated immediate instruction, but NOT CMP
